items.name: pjpi
items.description: This repository contains the code needed to reproduce the paper: Partially Joint Petrophysical Inversion as published in Geophysical Journal International. It conatains code for cross-gradient inversion on unstructured meshes, the P-JPI algorithm and the algorithm to detect areas of inconsistent petrophysical relationships

items.name: padlock
items.description: Padlock analyzes Go struct memory layout to find padding waste, cache-line false sharing, and data locality problems. Auto-fixes field ordering, flags concurrent access risks, and ranks findings by real impact. CLI-first, CI-ready, multi-arch aware.
